# Wedding Website - Bilingual (English/Spanish)

This is a static wedding website with bilingual support for hosting on GitHub Pages.

## Project Structure
- `index.html` - Main HTML file with bilingual content
- `styles.css` - Styling with cream and gold color scheme
- `script.js` - Language switching functionality
- `images/` - Wedding photos and graphics
- `translations.js` - Translation content for English and Spanish

## Design Theme
- Cream and gold elegant wedding theme
- Modern, responsive design
- Mobile-friendly layout

## Features
- Language toggle (English ↔ Spanish)
- Welcome section
- Wedding details (date, time, venue)
- Timeline/Schedule
- Photo gallery
- RSVP information
- Registry links

## Deployment
Ready for GitHub Pages deployment via repository settings.
